signal_definitions.name: Active mission build cycle
signal_definitions.client_specific_insight: Peregrine needs buyers who can act before traditional flight heritage exists.
signal_definitions.why_it_matters: Active mission builders may need components before heritage objections freeze vendor choice.
signal_definitions.recommended_action: Enrich account, identify technical and commercial buyers, prepare founder-reviewed outreach.
signal_definitions.bird_dog_setup_notes: Monitor funded NewSpace accounts for mission announcements, payload milestones, launch windows, and hiring tied to payload, comms, timing, or navigation.

signal_definitions.name: Optical communications relevance
signal_definitions.client_specific_insight: Peregrine has potential optical communications relevance beyond a single payload wedge.
signal_definitions.why_it_matters: Comms-focused satellite builders may create expansion paths if timing or payload constraints are active.
signal_definitions.recommended_action: Monitor and research before full enrichment unless another urgency signal appears.
signal_definitions.bird_dog_setup_notes: Monitor comms payload announcements, optical terminal partnerships, constellation milestones, and supply chain constraints.

signal_definitions.name: Flight heritage blocker
signal_definitions.client_specific_insight: Flight heritage is often a risk-transfer objection, not only a technical objection.
signal_definitions.why_it_matters: Accounts with high heritage barriers may need different routing, proof, and objection handling.
signal_definitions.recommended_action: Route to manual review or hold unless a strong internal champion or urgent mission need exists.
signal_definitions.bird_dog_setup_notes: Watch for procurement language, heritage requirements, prime contractor status, and mission-critical vendor qualification constraints.
